---
id: rebuild-lastfm
title: "Rebuild Last.fm data"
description: "Performs a full rebuild of Last.fm data, re-importing all scrobble history. Returns an HTML fragment."
sidebar_label: "Rebuild Last.fm data"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true

sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Rebuild Last.fm data"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/preferences/lastfm/rebuild"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Performs a full rebuild of Last.fm data, re-importing all scrobble history. Returns an HTML fragment.

  parameters={undefined}
>
